display.purpose: Hero headlines only. One per page.

headline.purpose: Section titles. Renders as h2; underlined by border-b in base styles.

title.purpose: Sub-section and card titles. Renders as h3.

body.purpose: Reading text. Cap measure at 65 to 75ch.

label.purpose: Buttons, nav links, captions, metadata. Sentence case.

cjk-display.purpose: Chinese hero and section headings. Ma Shan Zheng calligraphy.

cjk-body.purpose: Chinese reading text. Noto Sans SC, line-height 1.8.

shadows.name: rest-lift
shadows.purpose: Default soft lift on cards and buttons at rest. The single sanctioned shadow tier.

shadows.name: focus-lift
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus ring on interactive controls. Sage Emerald at low alpha.

motion.name: ease-soft
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for state transitions. Quart-style, no bounce.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Color and opacity transitions on hover/focus.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Section reveals and entrance animations on scroll.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The working CTA across the site. Sage Emerald fill, Warm Paper text, soft rest-lift.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #079669; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font: 500 14px/1.4 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui), sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(57% 0.13 162 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05), 0 0 0 3px rgb(7 150 105 / 0.18); }

components.name: Outline Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet counter-CTA. Used on the hero alongside the primary. Honey Amber stroke and text on transparent.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: transparent; color: #f69109; border: 1px solid #f69109; border-radius: 6px; font: 500 14px/1.4 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui), sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-outline-secondary:hover { color: oklch(75% 0.17 60 / 0.6); border-color: oklch(75% 0.17 60 / 0.6); } .ds-btn-outline-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(246 145 9 / 0.2); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default content card. Warm Paper, 12px radius, 1px Fine Rule border, single soft shadow.
components.html:
A teacher's notebook

A short reflection from this week's group meditation, written for students who couldn't make it.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; padding: 24px; background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0f; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font: 600 24px/1.25 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui), sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; font: 400 16px/1.7 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui), sans-serif; color: #0a0a0f; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form text field. Transparent background, Fine Rule stroke, Sage Emerald focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font: 500 14px/1.4 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui), sans-serif; color: #0a0a0f; } .ds-input { height: 36px; padding: 4px 12px; background: transparent; color: #0a0a0f; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 6px; font: 400 14px/1.4 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui), sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #71717a; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(7 150 105 / 0.18); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Top-nav anchor. Label-typography link with Sage hover. No pill, no underline at rest.
components.html: AboutProgramsJournal
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 8px 12px; color: #0a0a0f; text-decoration: none; font: 500 14px/1.4 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui), sans-serif; border-radius: 6px; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #079669; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #079669; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(7 150 105 / 0.18); }

narrative.overview: Pacing is the design. The site is read at the speed of someone considering a teacher, not converting on a funnel. Vertical rhythm is generous, transitions are slow, type breathes. The system sits in the warm-craft lane: independent yoga studios and boutique retreats, not consumer wellness apps. Surfaces are mostly paper-white, lifted only where lift earns its place. Color is used sparingly and warmly. Typography carries hierarchy, not chrome. Imagery is photographic and human. It explicitly rejects the wellness-app SaaS sheen, the new-age cliché, the corporate-startup template, and the devotional/ashram register.
keyCharacteristics: Pacing first: generous spacing, unhurried motion, long scroll
Paper-white default surfaces with warm tinted neutrals
Restrained color: one accent at a time, never three at once
Photography of people and place, not stock serenity
Bilingual parity: the same craft in en and zh-Hans

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Sage Emerald is the working accent. Honey Amber appears as a counter-note no more than once per surface. Dusk Iris is tertiary only. Never use all three on the same page.

rules.name: The No-Iris-Atmosphere Rule
rules.body: Iris is forbidden in atmospheric or decorative roles: no purple radial gradients, no purple background washes, no purple imagery overlays.

rules.name: The Warm-Paper Rule
rules.body: The page background is warm paper, never pure cool white. Drift toward oklch(99% 0.005 80) over time.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: English typography is a single Geist family. Voice comes from weight contrast, not from font pairing.

rules.name: The Bilingual Parity Rule
rules.body: CJK uses Ma Shan Zheng for display and Noto Sans SC for body, with line-height 1.8. Never reuse Latin line-heights on a CJK surface.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: All headings, labels, and CTAs are sentence case. ALL CAPS and track-spaced uppercase are forbidden.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: New components are flat. Lift is reserved for cards, popovers, dropdowns, and the hero CTA. If a component is asking for a second shadow tier, the answer is more space.

rules.name: The No-Glass Rule
rules.body: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur on tinted backgrounds) is forbidden as decoration. The current bg-white/30 backdrop-blur-3xl pattern is documented drift.

dos: Do keep page surfaces Warm Paper, drifting toward oklch(99% 0.005 80). Sections alternate via Warm Paper Tinted, not via colour.
Do use Sage Emerald as the working accent. One voice per page.
Do cap body line length at 65 to 75ch and keep body line-height at 1.7 (1.8 for CJK).
Do treat prefers-reduced-motion as a first-class state. Animated background gradients must collapse to a static frame.
Do keep CJK typography on equal craft footing: Ma Shan Zheng display, Noto Sans SC body, line-height tuned per script.
Do lead with photography of Grace, the studio, and real people. One decisive image beats five mediocre ones.
Do use sentence case across headings, labels, and CTAs.
Do treat the focus ring as part of the design (Sage Emerald, 3px, low alpha). Never outline none without replacement.
donts: Don't use Dusk Iris in atmospheric or decorative roles. No purple radial gradients, no purple washes, no purple-cosmos imagery.
Don't revive the indigo/purple hero gradient pattern. Documented drift; new work must not extend it.
Don't ship the translucent glass card variant (bg-white/30 backdrop-blur-3xl) as a default. Glassmorphism is rare and purposeful.
Don't place colour stripes on the side of cards, list items, or alerts. Use full borders, leading icons, or nothing.
Don't introduce a serif display font, a mono accent, or a script. Geist is the single English family.
Don't use ALL CAPS body, headings, or CTA labels. No track-spaced uppercase metadata.
Don't build hero-metric grids or identical-feature card rows.
Don't use stock soft-focus imagery, mandalas, lotus icons, or chakra colour wheels.
Don't write reverent or devotional copy. TM is a secular technique.
Don't treat the Chinese surface as a translation layer. Tune line-height, font, and rhythm per script.
Don't add a second shadow tier. If a component is asking for it, give it more space.
